user.title: IPBuilding Gateway
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of the IPBuilding Gateway. The default host (127.0.0.1) is correct for the Supervisor add-on; change it for standalone Docker or remote installs.

hassio_confirm.title: IPBuilding Gateway add-on detected
hassio_confirm.description: The {addon} add-on is running and reachable. Add it to Home Assistant?

discovery_confirm.title: IPBuilding Gateway discovered
discovery_confirm.description: Home Assistant found an IPBuilding Gateway at {url}. Add it?

onboarding_intro.title: Set up your installation
onboarding_intro.description: We will scan the field bus, map rooms to Home Assistant areas, and prepare your devices. Button actions can be configured in a later update.

onboarding_discovery.title: Field bus scan
onboarding_discovery.description: Scan complete. Added: {added}, changed: {changed}, removed: {removed}. Duration: {duration_s} s. Continue to room mapping.

onboarding_rooms.title: Map rooms to areas
onboarding_rooms.description: Link {room_count} IPBuilding room(s) to Home Assistant areas. Leave empty to create an area with the same name.

onboarding_done.title: Setup complete
onboarding_done.description: Discovery added {added} module(s). {room_count} room(s) mapped. {button_count} button(s) imported. You can re-run this wizard from integration options.

onboarding_modules_refresh.title: Reading button configuration
onboarding_modules_refresh.description: Reading getButtons from the IP1100PoE module(s)…

onboarding_buttons_overview.title: Button configuration found
onboarding_buttons_overview.description: Detected {button_count} physical button(s); {actionable_count} have actions configured. Warnings: {warning_count}. Continue to choose targets.

onboarding_buttons_review.title: Choose button targets
onboarding_buttons_review.description: Pick a light or switch for each configured button. Leave empty to skip an action. The wizard will create one automation per slot, default off.

error.gateway_unreachable: Could not reach the gateway at {host}:{port}. Is it running?
error.connection_refused: Connection refused — is the gateway running?

abort.invalid_discovery_info: The discovery payload was incomplete or malformed.
abort.already_discovered_addon: This gateway is running as a Home Assistant add-on and is already discovered via Supervisor.
abort.not_ipbuilding_gateway_addon: This Supervisor add-on is not the IPBuilding Gateway.
